- Status: Open to Full-Stack Opportunities

## Projects

### AI Advertisement Tool
- Tech: Python, RAG, ETL
- End-to-end content engine using RAG framework synthesizing data from LinkedIn, GitHub, and web portfolios. ETL pipeline for unstructured web data to LLM-based script generation with automated video/audio synthesis.

### Temporal RAG Pipeline
- Tech: Python, RAG, ETL
- End-to-end pipeline for video input with temporal query support. Uses advanced data structures and audio-video technologies for timeline-based answers beyond semantic similarity.

### Anti-UAS Implementation
- Tech: Python, Physics Modeling
- Simulated anti-drone defense logic with mathematical modeling of projectile trajectories and signal interference using Newtonian physics.

### Game Development Framework
- Tech: Python, Godot, Networking
- Playable AI debate game (Ace Attorney-style) with LLM opponent and judge LLM. Built on Godot, Python, and Groq with RAG layer for character personality.

### BitNet-1.58b Research
- Tech: Python, Machine Learning, Mathematics
- Novel research on BitNet-1.58b, experimenting with altered context lengths and ternary weight architectures.

### SWA-based LLMs Research
- Tech: Python, Machine Learning, Mathematics
- Research on Qwen 2.5 family quantization using BitNet's ternary engine.

## Experience

### Associate — Next Tech Lab AP (Oct 2025 – Present)
- Location: Amaravati, Andhra Pradesh
- Research collective exploring low-level implementations of emerging technologies
- Peer-to-peer technical workshops on systems programming and AI architecture

### Technical Content Writer — Notecove, Stealth Startup (May–Aug 2025)
- Location: Remote
- Authored 30+ technical articles on emerging software trends and AI ethics
- Synthesized complex engineering concepts into accessible documentation
- Defined technical voice and content strategy with founding team

### ML Intern — Hush, Startup (Mar 2025 – Present)
- Location: Remote
- Worked with image models for user profile verification
- Collaborated on user experience definition and enhancement

## Education

## Published Work
- "The Mathematics That Make 1.58-bit Weights Work" — In-depth forensic analysis of BitNet b1.58's quantization survival mechanisms, covering Absmean Quantization, Weight Scale Tensors, Sub_norm Adaptive Gain, and RoPE Theta positional headroom.
